calendar.description: House Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill enacts the Companion Chatbot Safety Act to regulate operators of companion chatbots and protect consumers.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms; <hr><ltbullet>requires operators of companion chatbots to comply with the Utah Consumer Privacy Act; <hr><ltbullet>establishes disclosure and data protection requirements for operators; <hr><ltbullet>establishes additional safety requirements for operators serving minor users; <hr><ltbullet>authorizes rulemaking for age assurance standards; <hr><ltbullet>requires annual reporting by operators to the Office of Artificial Intelligence Policy; <hr><ltbullet>grants enforcement authority to the Division of Consumer Protection; <hr><ltbullet>provides for administrative fines and civil penalties; <hr><ltbullet>establishes a safe harbor provision for operators; <hr><ltbullet>requires the Office of Artificial Intelligence Policy to study and report on companion chatbot safety standards; and <hr><ltbullet>provides a severability clause.
